title: Sidebar header: merge Kanban Agent identity + project switcher into one row
prompt:
GOAL (web-ui, frontend only): In the dockable Kanban-agent sidebar header, collapse the current TWO header rows (dock controls on one row, project switcher on a separate row below) into a SINGLE row. Left side = the project selector, whose trigger now also carries the 'Kanban Agent' identity (e.g. an icon + 'Kanban Agent · <ProjectName>' + chevron). Right side = the existing dock control buttons, right-aligned on the same row. This reclaims a full row of vertical space in the narrow sidebar and makes the expanded header show the 'Kanban Agent' identity (today it only appears in the COLLAPSED vertical strip).

CONTEXT (read first):
- web-ui/src/components/home-agent/dockable-chat-panel.tsx — DockHeaderWithChildren currently renders, top to bottom: <ChatDockHeader …/> (the dock control buttons), then {projectSwitcher}, then children, then <SidebarOpsStatusBar/>. The change: put ChatDockHeader's controls and projectSwitcher on the SAME flex row (project selector left/grows, dock controls right/shrink-0). The collapsed strip (CollapsedChatStrip) already shows a vertical 'Kanban Agent' label — keep it; this only changes the EXPANDED header.
- web-ui/src/components/home-agent/project-switcher.tsx — SidebarProjectSwitcher: the Radix Popover trigger button currently shows FolderOpen icon + project name + ChevronDown. Update the trigger label to read like 'Kanban Agent · <ProjectName>' (identity + project), keeping truncation on the project name. Confirm exact wording/icon while implementing; keep it compact for a narrow sidebar.
- ChatDockHeader is the component rendering the dock left/right/float/close/collapse/hide buttons (find it near dockable-chat-panel.tsx). It may need to expose its buttons so they can sit inline at the row's right edge rather than as a standalone full-width row — refactor minimally, do not duplicate the buttons.

CONSTRAINTS:
- Frontend only. Follow AGENTS.md web-ui rules: Tailwind v4, Radix, lucide, surface tokens (surface-1/2/3, border, text-secondary), src/components/ui primitives, cn(). Dark theme only.
- Narrow-sidebar resilient: project name truncates, dock buttons stay shrink-0 and fully clickable; nothing overflows horizontally.
- Do not change dock behavior, the popover project list/Add Project, the ops status bar, or the chat panel below.

ACCEPTANCE:
- Expanded sidebar header is a single row: left = project selector carrying the 'Kanban Agent' identity, right = dock control buttons. One fewer vertical row than before.
- Project name still truncates; all dock controls still work; no horizontal overflow at narrow widths.
- Collapsed strip unchanged. web:typecheck + biome clean. No any types.
